    gainEnergy(int) - Method in class game.model.PlayerState

    GameApplication - Class in game.ui
    JavaFX application that wires the UI, audio, and game events together.
    GameApplication() - Constructor for class game.ui.GameApplication
     
    GameEngine - Class in game.engine
    Core game rules engine that executes turns, scoring, and skill usage.
    GameEngine() - Constructor for class game.engine.GameEngine
     
    GameEventListener - Interface in game.engine
    Listener interface for gameplay events surfaced to UI or other observers.
    GameState - Class in game.model
    Mutable container for board, player, and turn state.
    GameState() - Constructor for class game.model.GameState
     
    GameUiController - Class in game.ui
    UI controller that routes input to the game engine and forwards events.
    GameUiController() - Constructor for class game.ui.GameUiController
